title: release freeze post close gate v3
outOfScope: Any adopter project or installed runtime repository
Starting or reordering planned Work Items
Application behavior and enterprise security/compliance claims

sources.reason: Corrective release-freeze timing Contract for the template repository.
Excludes audit-only archive and generated no-active status from installable source identity.
Reserves one corrective archive record, 485 to 486.
Rejects release candidates without generated post-close lifecycle evidence.
Generates the final freeze only from a clean, synchronized default branch with no active Work Items.
Documents the executable post-close freeze command and fail-closed order.

rawUserRequest: 总结本次发布流程问题并改进，确保合并后执行 ai-close-work-item、同步默认分支，再进行最终冻结和发布；只修改模板工程，不启动或跳过计划内工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Make release source identity stable across Work Item closure by excluding audit-only files and enforce post-close finalization order.

riskAssessment.reason: The fix is limited to release archive identity and governance budget; adopter/runtime paths are excluded.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized the complete corrective release workflow and template-only process hardening.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Archive and closure evidence changes after merge
Audit-only files are excluded without touching adopter projects
Archive budget is reserved before the corrective archive

preReviewWarnings: Verify export-ignore semantics, final post-close source identity, archive budget, and template/adopter boundary.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Audit-only archive and generated no-active status files are excluded from normalized installable source identity.
The post-close final tree produces a stable deterministic archive digest and matches release freeze metadata.
Archive budget is explicitly reserved from 485 to 486 and all lifecycle evidence remains owned.
Final freeze metadata is generated only by the post-close finalizer from a clean synchronized default branch; direct or pre-close freeze data is rejected.
CI/PR blocks are first classified for a process-root cause; preventable workflow failures are stopped and converted into executable fail-closed gates before retry.
PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, default-branch sync, and final release verification complete successfully.
guidelines: Keep template release evidence separate from adopter runtime state.
Freeze release metadata only after Work Item closure and default-branch synchronization.

intent.problem: The merged default branch changed twice after the freeze: first from archive evidence and again from ai-close-work-item closure evidence. Those audit-only files must not invalidate installable source identity.
constraints: Only template repository paths are in scope.
This is a corrective Work Item outside planned order.
Complete merge, closure, sync, then release verification.
Reserve exactly one archive record before finish.
intent.rationale: Export-ignore makes the source identity represent the installable template payload while preserving audit evidence in Git history.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized template process improvement, governance/release changes, PR, merge, closure, and publication confirmation.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
